articles.description: After Nottingham Forest's stunning win at Sunderland, is the Premier League relegation battle now a two-horse race?
articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Is it between West Ham and Spurs after Forest win?

articles.description: Real Madrid's slim title hopes suffer another setback as they squander victory against Real Betis by conceding a 93rd-minute equaliser.
articles.title: Real Betis 1-1 Real Madrid: Title hopes fading for Los Blancos with La Liga draw

articles.description: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes speaks to club legend Wayne Rooney in a wide-ranging interview.
articles.title: Bruno Fernandes talks to Wayne Rooney about Man Utd, the past, the future and England v Portugal

articles.description: Gianluca Prestianni is given a six-game ban by Uefa for homophobic conduct during Benfica's Champions League knockout play-off match with Real Madrid in February.
articles.title: Gianluca Prestianni banned for six matches by Uefa

articles.description: Jim Furyk is confirmed as captain of the US Ryder Cup team in 2027, when the event takes place in Ireland.
articles.title: Ryder Cup 2027: Jim Furyk to return as US Ryder Cup captain in 2027

articles.description: Defending champion Carlos Alcaraz says he will miss next month's French Open because of an ongoing wrist injury.
articles.title: French Open: Carlos Alcaraz to miss Grand Slam title defence with wrist injury

articles.description: The Turkish Grand Prix will return to the Formula 1 calendar in 2027 for the first time in six years.
articles.title: Turkish Grand Prix to return Formula 1 calendar in 2027

articles.description: Mendoza is just third player in history to be a Heisman Trophy winner, a national champion and the first overall draft pick in the same year.
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Fernando Mendoza is first overall pick by Las Vegas Raiders

articles.description: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.
articles.title: Who will win Premier League title? The big prediction special

articles.description: Morgan Rogers is open to a European move, Manuel Akanji is set to make his Inter Milan move permanent and Manchester City are confident of signing Elliot Anderson.
articles.title: Football gossip: Rogers, Akanji, Anderson, Lucca, Silva, Senesi, Leao
